factions.name: The Resistance
factions.description: Clandestine movement of dissidents, cyberactivists and ex-military. Based in The Cave. Led by Freya (formerly Dev).

factions.name: The Agency
factions.description: Organization that controls the career of artists and celebrities. Based in The Capital. True nature: coercive arm of the elite.

factions.name: The Unions
factions.description: Groups of humans and cyborgs representing social sectors. Founded after the First Revolution as mediation structure. Created The Net.
